\tzpentry{ID5747}{Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5747 introduces Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu} = \begin{pmatrix} -c^2 + (\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^2 & -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^T \\ -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r}) & \mathbb{I}_{3\times 3} \end{pmatrix} \end{equation}
